tagline.en: Getting everything ready for planting day!
tagline.da: Vi goer alt klar til plantedagen!

theme.hero_task: Paint plant markers for His Bed

tasks.action: Paint wooden plant markers for Bed A crops

prompt.en: Draw a picture or write the plant name on each marker -- spelling doesn't matter, pictures work great!
prompt.da: Tegn et billede eller skriv plantens navn paa hver markering -- stavning er ligegyldigt, billeder virker ogsaa!

tasks.action: Check beds are ready: soil level, drainage, copper tape intact

prompt.en: Walk the bed circuit: check soil level is 5cm from rim, copper tape unbroken, reservoirs filled.
prompt.da: Gaa bedrunden: tjek jordniveau er 5cm fra kanten, kobbertape er hel, reservoirer fyldt.

tasks.action: Lay out seeds and seedlings by each bed for planting day

prompt.en: Sort all seeds and plugs into labelled bags by bed letter.
prompt.da: Sorter alle froe og planter i maerkede poser efter bedbogstav.

tasks.action: Explore the garden together -- spot any early spring growth

prompt.en: Walk around and look -- can you find anything green poking up?
prompt.da: Gaa rundt og kig -- kan du finde noget groent, der stikker op?

growth_events.event: Strawberry crowns showing first green buds after winter dormancy

prompt.en: Look at the strawberry plants -- can you see tiny green leaves uncurling from the middle?
prompt.da: Kig paa jordbaerplanterne -- kan du se smaa groenne blade, der folder sig ud fra midten?
